<!--
Copy this into the GitHub release notes when tagging a new version. Mirrors
CHANGELOG.md's Keep a Changelog structure — fill in only the sections that
apply, delete the rest. See CONTRIBUTING.md's "Versioning" section for what
counts as major/minor/patch.
-->

## vX.Y.Z - YYYY-MM-DD

### Added

<!-- New capabilities: primitives, providers, plugins, reference docs. -->

### Changed

<!-- Behavior changes to something that already existed. -->

### Fixed

<!-- Bug fixes, including stability-review findings (dead code, unused
     exports, doc drift) that don't add or change a capability. -->

### Deprecated

<!-- A Public export (see references/api-reference.md) that still works but
     will be removed in a future major version, and what to use instead. -->

### Removed

<!-- Anything actually deleted this release — pair with a migration note if
     it was a Public export. -->

### Capability changes

<!-- If this release moves anything between references/release-audit.md's
     Implemented / Interface-only / Future-work classification, say so
     explicitly here — that table should stay in sync with each release. -->
